# InclusiFund

> Grants, tools, and a community for people building CICs, charities, and community-run businesses in the UK. Built neurodiverse-first. Operated by InclusiGroup Ltd.

InclusiFund is a UK funding ecosystem focused on grassroots community organisations — specifically CICs (Community Interest Companies), small charities, and community-run businesses that sit below the £1M income threshold where most institutional funding stops looking. We pair grant-matching and application-writing services with building tools (websites, director dashboards, content systems) for the same operators. Our worldview is set out in detail at /manifesto. Our impact ledger is at /receipts.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](/): Who InclusiFund is, what we offer, how to engage
- [Manifesto](/manifesto.md): Why the self-made myth is wrong and what we build instead
- [Receipts](/receipts.md): Seven numbers mapping one pound to the UK's £4.2bn small-charity funding gap

## Related surfaces

- studio.inclusifund.co.uk — our portfolio + studio landing pages (US/EG regions)
- aiq.inclusifund.co.uk — AI fluency assessment platform
- community.inclusifund.co.uk — Ghost-hosted member community
- tools.inclusifund.co.uk — CIC toolkit (eligibility, compliance, grant-finder)

## About the operator

- InclusiGroup Ltd is the registered company; InclusiFund is the brand.
- Founder: Reece Dunn. Contact: reece.dunn@inclusifund.co.uk.
- AntiGravity Projects is the build arm (web agency / digital studio) that delivers the technology side.
